Operation 'register' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is completely empty. data.description_suggestion: Registers a user email address for SSL Labs API access. Requires providing an email address in the request body. Upon successful registration, returns confirmation details and API access information. Registration enables the user to authenticate subsequent API requests using the registered email address.

message: Operation 'getInfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Description is empty. Added details about what information is returned (status, versions, operational details), authentication requirements, and use case guidance for AI agents to determine when to call this endpoint.

data.current_summary: Check SSL Labs availability and get engine info
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves current SSL Labs service status and assessment engine information. Returns service availability status, API version, engine version, and other operational details. No authentication required. Use this endpoint to verify service health before initiating assessments.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added details about what information is returned (status, versions, operational details), authentication requirements, and use case guidance for AI agents to determine when to call this endpoint.

message: Operation 'analyze' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is empty and summary is vague. Clarified that this operation both initiates and retrieves assessments (asynchronous pattern). Added parameter context, return value details, caching behavior, and polling guidance essential for AI agents to properly use this operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Initiate or retrieve SSL/TLS assessment results
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a new SSL/TLS assessment for a specified host or retrieves the status and results of an existing assessment. Accepts parameters including hostname, port, protocol, and assessment options. Returns assessment status, progress information, and endpoint analysis results when complete. Assessments are asynchronous; use the same parameters to poll for results. Results are cached for subsequent requests.
data.reasoning: Description is empty and summary is vague. Clarified that this operation both initiates and retrieves assessments (asynchronous pattern). Added parameter context, return value details, caching behavior, and polling guidance essential for AI agents to properly use this operation.

message: Operation 'getEndpointData' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Description is empty. Added context about prerequisites (completed assessment), required parameters (hostname, IP), and detailed output information (certificates, protocols, ciphers, vulnerabilities, grades) to help AI agents understand what data this operation provides and when it can be called.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive analysis data for a specific endpoint from a completed SSL/TLS assessment. Requires hostname and endpoint IP address parameters. Returns detailed endpoint information including certificate analysis, protocol support, cipher suites, vulnerability findings, and security grades. Endpoint data is only available after assessment completion.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added context about prerequisites (completed assessment), required parameters (hostname, IP), and detailed output information (certificates, protocols, ciphers, vulnerabilities, grades) to help AI agents understand what data this operation provides and when it can be called.

Added context about what status codes represent, their format (identifiers and descriptions), and use case guidance for AI agents to understand this is a reference endpoint for interpreting other API responses.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the enumeration of all status codes used by the SSL Labs API assessment engine. Returns a mapping of status code identifiers to their descriptions and meanings. Use this reference to interpret status values returned in assessment results and endpoint data.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added context about what status codes represent, their format (identifiers and descriptions), and use case guidance for AI agents to understand this is a reference endpoint for interpreting other API responses.

message: Operation 'getRootCertsRaw' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is empty. Added context about the certificate store's purpose (trust validation), parameter details (format option), output format information, and operational context (used for assessments). data.current_summary: Retrieve root certificates used for trust validation
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the root certificate store used by SSL Labs for certificate chain validation and trust analysis. Accepts an optional format parameter to specify the output format (e.g., PEM, DER). Returns the complete set of trusted root certificates in the requested format. This data is used internally for certificate validation during assessments.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added context about the certificate store's purpose (trust validation), parameter details (format option), output format information, and operational context (used for assessments). This helps AI agents understand what this reference data represents and how it's used.
